headline: ITA Investors: Watch These Two Events Over the Next 30 Days
summary: The iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF (NYSEARCA:ITA) is sitting on a 34% one-year gain heading into June, with shares at roughly $235 and $13.5 billion in net assets. Two events in the next four weeks will largely decide whether ITA keeps running: the Pentagon’s FY2027 budget moving through Congress, and the June 29 Honeywell ... headline: RTX's Collins Aerospace quadruples MRO footprint in Malaysia
summary: Collins Aerospace, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, has expanded its maintenance, repair and overhaul (MRO) facility at Subang Aerotech Park in Malaysia. The $63 million investment quadruples the company's Selangor MRO footprint, growing from 46,000 to 164,000 square feet, and establishes Subang as its key regional hub for advanced component MRO.

headline: If I Retired Tomorrow, This Is Exactly What I Would Do
summary: I advocate a modified 60/40 portfolio, shifting from stocks/bonds to 60% non-AI and 40% AI beneficiaries, using the TOLL framework. Learn more about the approach.

headline: Jefferies Upgrades RTX Corporation (RTX) To Buy From Hold
summary: RTX Corporation (NYSE:RTX) is among the 10 Best Aerospace and Defense Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On June 4, Jefferies analyst Sheila Kahyaoglu upgraded the stock to Buy from Hold and set a new price target of $220, up from $210. According to Barron’s, the analyst cited rising profit margins, growth prospects in […]
